profile.name: Kota Mizobuchi
profile.philosophy:
Hello!
I’m Kota Mizobuchi, also known as the “Engineer in the Beret,” and I’m currently studying design, technology, and entrepreneurship at Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology.
I’ve loved programming since I was little, but over time I’ve come to believe that creating products and sparking new ideas takes more than just coding skills. It also requires understanding design and being able to apply it in real ways. So I’ve been continuing to study and grow in that area.
At Kamiyama Marugoto KOSEN, I mainly work as an engineer, taking on implementation challenges across a wide range of fields as I expand my knowledge and skills.
I approach my daily creative activities with the keyword "Joy" in my heart.

items.description: Participating in a co-creation program between Sony Group / Arc & Beyond and students of Kamiyama Marugoto College, working as a student intern.
Enrolled in a private vocational college in Kamiyama, Tokushima, where I study Design, Engineering, and Entrepreneurship.

profile.title: Contact
profile.philosophy: I am currently open for freelance projects and collaborations. Feel free to contact me for questions or just to say hello. I will get back to you as soon as possible.
